title: Xaero WorldGen
description: Enable Xaero’s map to read chunks generated by Voxy WorldGen.
body:
# Xaero WorldGen
<details>
<summary>中文页面</summary>

## 该模组还在开发中，可能存在许多不稳定性（勉强能用）。  
使Xaero的地图能够读取Voxy WorldGen生成的区块。  
`目前仅适用于单人游戏。`  
![示例](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbc43d02d2d0b60c7b9d2a54b62c56ec99d72b77.png)

# 使用方法
1. 部署模组，进入游戏。
2. 随着Voxy WorldGen的运行，Xaero世界地图上会自动生成远处的区块。
3. 出现大块黑色区块是当前版本已知问题，重新进入存档或移动至此即可恢复。

</details>


<details>
<summary>English page</summary>

## This mod is still under development and may have many instabilities (barely usable).  
Enable Xaero’s map to read chunks generated by Voxy WorldGen.  
`Currently only available for single-player games.`  
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbc43d02d2d0b60c7b9d2a54b62c56ec99d72b77.png)

# Usage
1. Deploy the mod and enter the game.
2. As Voxy WorldGen runs, distant chunks will be automatically generated on the Xaero world map.
3. Large black chunks appearing is a known issue in the current version. Re-enter the save or move to that area to restore them.

</details>
